title: The Peg Who Loved Too Much
tagline: A love that cannot stand on its own two feet.
synopsis: A blue-hatted peg falls for a yellow-hatted peg across the divide of a carpeted living room, but they can never touch because they are permanently fixed to their respective plastic car-bases.
